name: Penne Pasta W/Tomatoes & Chile
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sun-dried tomatoes, cut into slivers
1 cup Black olives, cured in oil, pitted and halved
recipeInstructions:
Combine all ingredients, except the cheese and pasta, in a large bowl. Let sit at room temperature for a couple of hours to blend the flavors.
Cook the pasta in 4 quarts of boiling salted water until tender but still firm - 'al dente'. Drain.
Toss the pasta with the sauce and cheese until well coated and serve.
Serves: 6 Heat Scale: 5
